title: Add Open PR observation pagination
goal: Replace the bounded Open-PR observation cap with complete or explicitly paginated GitHub PR observation while preserving fail-closed behavior on partial failures.

metadata.source_review: Follow-up from PR #177 open-PR claim guard review.
metadata.safety_boundary: Pagination must not silently ignore later pages; partial observation fails closed for the affected repository.
metadata.outcome: Implemented in Bureau PR #228: Open-PR observation now fails closed with an explicit bounded-observation diagnostic when gh pr list reaches BUREAU_OPEN_PR_CLAIM_GUARD_LIMIT, and the cap behavior is documented.
validation: Bureau PR #228 GitHub CI passed validate (3.10) and validate (3.12).
Local before merge: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m ruff check src/bureau/v2.py tests/test_claim_guard.py README.md docs/concurrency.md -> passed.
Local before merge: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest tests/test_claim_guard.py tests/test_v2.py -q -> passed.
Local before merge: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m bureau.cli --root . check -> valid True.
Local before merge: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -> 356 passed.
Local before merge: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m ruff check . -> passed.
Local before merge: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m bureau.cli --root . --json doctor -> healthy true.
Local before merge: git diff --check -> passed.
Post-merge: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m bureau.cli --root . check -> valid True.

verified_acceptance.pagination-or-explicit-cap: src/bureau/v2.py raises OpenPullRequestObservationError when the observed page reaches BUREAU_OPEN_PR_CLAIM_GUARD_LIMIT, so bounded coverage cannot be mistaken for complete coverage.
verified_acceptance.partial-failure: The cap-reached error uses the same fail-closed observation path as GitHub failures and is scoped by the affected repository reservation logic.
verified_acceptance.configuration-docs: README.md and docs/concurrency.md document BUREAU_OPEN_PR_CLAIM_GUARD_LIMIT and the fail-closed cap behavior.

acceptance.assertion: Open PR observation either paginates all available results or reports an explicit bounded-observation diagnostic that cannot be mistaken for complete coverage.
Tests cover a later-page or pagination failure and show that the affected repository fails closed.
The interaction between pagination, BUREAU_OPEN_PR_CLAIM_GUARD_LIMIT and GitHub CLI limits is documented.
